  • Next Graphql Apollo Typescript_Boostrap - Pobochastars62 - React + GraphQL + Next.js + Apollo + Scss + Typescript + Prettier & EsLint boilerplate
  • Next & Vercel Typescript templatestars22 - Serverless, Typescript, Jest, Github CI, SCSS, prettier boilerplate
  • NextJS in Firebase with Bootstrapstars25 - Hosting NextJS app with Bootstrap in Firebase with Cloud Functions.
  • Next Simple Starterstars776 - Simple PWA boilerplate with Next.js and Redux.
  • NextJS Starterstars1.3k - Starter project for Next.js with and email and oAuth authentication.
  • nextjs-starterstars304 - An SEO Optimized Next.js 10 starter kit template with React 17 + Typescript + Tailwind CSS 2 + React Query 3 + (GitHub Auth + Passwordless Auth) using (NextAuth.js and Fauna DB), ESLint, Prettier, Pre-commit hook with Husky. Can have different layouts for different pages.
  • RAN!stars2.1k - Production-ready boilerplate with support for GraphQL, SSR, Hot-reload, CSS-in-JS, caching, and more.
  • Next Simple Blogstars532 - Simple Markdown based blog built with Next.js with static exports.

  • Next Express Bootstrap Boilerplatestars102 - Boilerplate for a full stack app built using Next, Express, react-bootstrap, SCSS and SSR with eslint.
  • Next Blog Firestorestars226 - Blog with simple CMS built with Next.js, Firebase Firestore, styled-components and mobx-state-tree.
  • Next Redux Starterstars268 - Next.js starter with Express, Redux, and PostCSS.
  • NextJS Redux-Wrapper Material-UIstars91 - 🤓 A boilerplate NextJS with Redux and Material UI.
  • Staartstars313 - 😎 Actively maintained Next.js components library and minimal boilerplate to rapidly get staarted with app with working user accounts based on Ooth.
  • NextJS TypeScript Starter Kitstars344 - TypeScript + NextJS, Styled-jsx, Redux, PostCSS, configurable SEO
  • Next Boilerplate - External CSS and Sass + Importing images from anywhere + Prettier and Eslint + Environment variables and many more features.
  • next-starterstars24 - A full and simple boilerplate with sass (.scss) and postcssbuilt in.
  • Typescript Monorepo Next Examplestars36 - A minimalistic next.js + typescript monorepo.
  • tomimick/tm-nextjs-starterstars46 - A minimal starter/demo with basic CRUD, axios/localstorage, MobX, SASS, static site export, live demo
  • csprance/next-smrtstars36 - A minimal boilerplate with redux, styled-components, material-ui and typescript with a custom express server.
  • Nextronstars1.1k - An Electron with Next.js apps generator ⚡
  • next-boilerplatestars997 - A well-structured production ready Next.js boilerplate with Typescript, Redux, Express.js, Sass, Css, EnvConfig, Reverse Proxy, Bundle
  • Oh My Fullstackstars105 - Full stack web application skeleton (Next.js, Redux, RxJS, Immutable, Express)
  • Next-Postgres-With-Typescriptstars9 - Forum-like fullstack web app with Next 7.0.2 + Sequelize 4/Postgres + Typescript + Redux + Passport Local Auth + Emotion
  • Next.js with Express and Babelstars3 - An application skeleton for those who want to transpile their Express as well as their Next.js code using Babel.
  • next-postgres-graphql - Create SSR Next.js websites using GraphQL with Postgres (Next.js, Postgres, GraphQL)
  • nextjs-mongodb-appstars740 - Full-fledged app made with Next.JS and MongoDB, with authentication and much more (Next.js 9, MongoDB)
  • react-next-boilerplatestars148 - A basis for reducing the configuration of your projects with nextJS, best development practices and popular libraries in the developer community.
  • The-Nextjs-starterstars13 - typescript + redux + styled-components + react-testing-library + eslint + fontawesome
  • The Knests Stackstars171 - Full stack boilerplate/hackathon starter with: PostgreSQL, Knex.js, NestJS, Next.js (obviously), GraphQL, React (with hooks and typescript), Material-UI, Docker multistage images for, Docker compose and a Gitlab CI/CD pipeline fully configured.
  • Deviistars323 - A Medium-inspired dev blog starter built with Next.js, React, and TypeScript, with Markdown rendering, syntax highlighting, SEO/meta tags, and RSS feed generation out of the box.
  • Nextjs Blog Starter - 🚀 The perfect starter code for your blog based on Next.js framework. ⚡️ Made with Next.js, TypeScript, ESLint, Prettier, PostCSS, Tailwind CSS.
  • Next.js and Netlify Blogging Templatestars197 - A perfect boilerplate for building a blog website on Netlify stacks with standard features like tagging, CMS, and shortcodes.
  • Nextjs Apollo Nexusstars3 - GraphQL Apollo Client-Server integration in Next.js with Nexus Schema (Code first approach).
  • Nextjs Starter Peacockstars69 - 🦚 Beautiful Nextjs portfolio starter for software engineers and designers to show work they're so proud of.
  • Nextaticstars26 - 🌍 Static website multi-language boilerplate with user-editable pages and navigation using Netlify CMS + Next.js + SCSS + Typescript.
  • Sitemap generator for NextJS & StrAPIstars1 - 🦾 An additional server on express that runs alongside nextjs and regenerates sitemap ( with index sitemap ) and robots.txt files on request from STR API.
  • superplatestars966 - superplate creates Next.js app in seconds with TypeScript, styled-components, SWR, Storybook, and 35+ plugin.

Extensions

  • Next universal language detectorstars55 - Language detector that works universally (browser + server) - Meant to be used with a universal framework, such as Next.js DEMO
  • Next Routesstars2.3k - Universal named routes for Next.js.

  • Next PurgeCSSstars126 - Easily integrate Purgecss, which helps you remove unused CSS from your bundle.

  • flow-middlewarestars17 - Run any of Express middlewares on Next.js without polluting native objects.
